title: Date and Mushroom Jalebi
description: A unique dessert recipe that combines the sweetness of dates with the crunch of jalebi and earthy flavor of mushrooms.
instructions: 1. Heat ghee in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add chopped mushrooms and sauté until they're golden brown.
3. Add pitted dates and cook for another 2-3 minutes.
4. Sprinkle ground cardamom and sugar over the mixture.
6. Meanwhile, heat jalebi according to package instructions.
7. Serve warm jalebi with the date and mushroom mixture.
8. Garnish with chopped cardamom, if desired.
